query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.teamRole, tm.id as tmId, tm.name as tmName FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%lozano%' OR u.name LIKE '%alvarez%' OR u.email LIKE '%alvarez%' OR u.email LIKE '%lozano%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.teamRole, tm.id as tmId, tm.name as tmName FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%lozano%' OR u.name LIKE '%alvarez%' OR u.email LIKE '%alvarez%' OR u.email LIKE '%lozano%';
